title: Bug fixes (5) + portfolio factor exposures & copula risk endpoints

bugs_found: insider_trading.py: empty Finnhub return had inconsistent dict structure (missing source, lookback_days, n_buys, n_sells keys), causing downstream KeyError or silent fallback
trends_sentiment.py: z-score denominator used max(std, 1) which suppresses z-scores when std is between 0 and 1; changed to max(std, 0.01)
trends_sentiment.py: when only fear OR greed data available (not both), the function computed a misleading one-sided ratio, falsely signaling extreme fear or greed
portfolio router: RiskContribRequest accepted mismatched tickers/weights list lengths, causing IndexError deep in attribution service
portfolio router: RiskContribRequest accepted negative weights, producing garbage MCTR results
observation.gap_identified: Portfolio router missing two key endpoints despite services being ready: Fama-French factor exposures (decompose_portfolio) and copula-based tail risk (compute_copula_risk_from_returns). Frontend API client also lacked typed functions for these.

bugs_fixed: insider_trading.py: empty Finnhub return now returns consistent structure with all expected keys
insider_trading.py: extracted total_buy/sell_value computation for clarity
trends_sentiment.py: z-score denominator changed from max(std, 1) to max(std, 0.01)
trends_sentiment.py: one-sided data now returns neutral result with explanation instead of misleading ratio
portfolio router: added field_validator to RiskContribRequest ensuring len(weights)==len(tickers) and all weights >= 0
implementation.feature_built: Two new portfolio endpoints: POST /api/portfolio/factor-exposures (Fama-French 5-factor decomposition with style interpretation) and POST /api/portfolio/copula-risk (copula-based tail risk with VaR/CVaR). Frontend TypeScript API client updated with typed functions and interfaces.

limitations: Copula risk endpoint uses yf.download directly instead of data_fetcher abstraction; works but bypasses caching
Factor exposure endpoint is slow (~10-20s for 5+ holdings) because each stock decomposition fetches individually
Frontend pages not yet built to consume the two new endpoints
assessment.self_critique: Would have liked to add frontend components for the new endpoints, but focused on getting the backend wiring correct first. The copula endpoint needs integration testing with live data.

next_steps: Build frontend factor exposure visualization (bar chart + style box) for portfolio page
Build frontend copula tail risk heatmap display
Add caching to the new endpoints (factor data is slow to fetch repeatedly)
Integrate copula VaR into the main portfolio analyze response
Add sector information to portfolio commentary endpoint (currently hardcoded empty)
